message.content:
Explore the CitedBy.ai codebase at C:\Users\User\citedby-ai to understand the analysis flow when a user submits a URL for audit. I need to understand:

1. How the "Nouvel Audit" / Analyze page works - read pages/Analyze.tsx (or similar) to understand the URL submission flow
2. How results are stored and passed between pages - look at App.tsx for state management (history, analysisResults, etc.)
3. What happens when analysis completes - how does the app navigate to Results page
4. What is the AnalysisResult type - read types.ts or types/index.ts
5. How existing services like analyzer.ts and generator.ts work during analysis
6. How the generative tools pages (SchemaOrg, RobotsTxt, LlmsTxtGenerator, etc.) receive their props and data

Be very thorough. Read the actual files, not just search for them. Focus on the data flow: URL input → analysis → results storage → tool pages access.

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough exploration of the CitedBy.ai codebase to understand the analysis flow. Let me start by examining the structure and key files.

content.content: Exit code 1

content.text: Let me use the proper tools for exploration.
